0.text: Dependent density increases in the lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Subpleural streaks in the lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Focal ground-glass areas in the mediobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Focal ground-glass areas in the medial part of the lower lobe superior segment

4.text: Focal ground-glass areas in the anterior segments of the upper lobes of both lungs

5.text: Several nonspecific nodules measuring 2-3 mm in diameter in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung
